style_effects: Gentle, iridescent fairy dust particles drift upward in slow, shimmering spirals around Chansey, each particle refracting soft pastel light like dewdrops. A warm, pearlescent aura emanates from her body in delicate, petal-shaped rings that pulse gently with a pale pink and lavender hue. The lighting mood is serene and dreamy, bathed in a soft, diffused glow reminiscent of morning sunlight through cherry blossoms. Clean cel-shaded Pokémon illustration style with bold outlines and soft shading.
